title: `Iyiym #5864
definition:
Iim = "ruins"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab
 2) a town in Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Iim = "ruins"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab
 2) a town in Judah

    NASB:  a place on the E. border of Moab
